hero.title:
E-KEI
LOGISTICS
hero.subtitle: Fast, Accurate, and Friendly
hero.description: Centered in Shanghai, we connect Asia and the Americas through a global logistics network. We provide one-stop solutions from air and ocean freight to inland transportation, customs clearance, and warehouse management.

about.title: E-KEI LOGISTICS CO., LTD

profile.locationValue: Global logistics network connecting Asia and the Americas, centered in Shanghai
profile.specialtyValue: Precision equipment (semiconductors, LCD displays), hazardous materials, specialized cargo (machinery, refrigerated goods, project cargo)

about.quote: From start to finish, EKL has continuously strived to provide the most efficient and sustainable services to our valuable customers.
about.address: Rm405,406 Hongqiao Crystal Business Bld., No2 Lane, 280 Hongjing Rd., Shanghai, China
about.ceoQuote: E-KEI LOGISTICS is more than just a freight forwarding company. We are a partner in your global business growth. With cutting-edge technology and expert teams, we deliver services that exceed customer expectations.

values.title: Global Logistics Leadership

values.title: Customer-Centric Service
values.desc: We build strong trust through customized services and pursue long-term strategic partnerships.
